content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the car positioned slightly right of center, track boundaries clearly visible on both sides, and the car appears well on course.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 75, target = (75 + 5) % 121 = 80
- Target WP80: x=1.9924, y=4.4840
- Car: x=2.2390, y=4.5292, heading=160.64°
- dy = 4.4840 - 4.5292 = -0.0452
- dx = 1.9924 - 2.2390 = -0.2466
- bearing = atan2(-0.0452, -0.2466) = 180° + atan(0.0452/0.2466) = -(180° - 10.4°) = -169.6°
- delta = -169.6° - 160.64° = -330.24°, normalize: -330.24° + 360° = +29.76°
- |delta| ≈ 29.8°: moderate left correction needed, use steering_angle=+15°, speed=1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead, car is 0.038m right of center, delta of +29.8° to WP80 indicates moderate left correction needed, applying +15° steering at 1.5 speed.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "Delta under 5° means steer 0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Delta 5-15° use ±5°; 15-30° use ±10 to ±15°; 30-50° use ±15 to ±20°",
    "Near WP74-80, track curves left — positive delta expected, gentle-to-moderate left steering",
    "Speed 1.5 safe on straight/gentle curve sections",
    "Car tends to drift slightly right of center on left curves — anticipate left correction",
    "Heading near 160-165° corresponds to west-northwest travel on this section",
    "WP80 lookahead gives ~+30° delta at this section — moderate left curve",
    "Oversteer warning: avoid excessive correction when near track center",
    "Track continues curving left through WP75-85 section"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [2.423, 2.323, 2.239],
    "y": [4.447, 4.487, 4.529],
    "yaw": [165.79, 163.17, 160.64]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP80 at (1.992, 4.484): dy=-0.045, dx=-0.247, bearing=-169.6°, delta=+29.8° → moderate left, steer +15°",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
